name: Maybank Kim Eng Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Maybank Kim Eng Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited provides investment and securities services to corporate and individual customers in Thailand. It operates in two segments, Securities Business and Investment Banking. The company provides online trading, retail broking, derivatives trading and warrants, offshore trading, mutual funds, and institutional sale services. It also offers investment banking services, such as equity/equity-linked capital market services, including IPO/PO/PP, privatization, listing and going public, dual listings, and listing in Singapore; and debt capital market products comprising Baht debentures, loans, property funds, securitization products, project finance, and structure finance. In addition, the company provides financial advisory services in the areas of mergers and acquisitions, financial partners and/or strategic partners, independent financial advisors, joint ventures, DI fund placement, and debt restructuring. Further, it offers corporate banking, multi-currency cash management, trade financing, transaction banking, and treasury services, as well as new instruments comprising convertible debenture, warrants and options, and derivative products. Additionally, the company provides securities trading, borrowing, and lending; securities and derivatives brokerage; underwriting; investment and wealth management; and block trade services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 30 branches in Bangkok and upcountry. The company was formerly known as Kim Eng Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Maybank Kim Eng Securities (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Maybank Kim Eng Holdings Limited.
